text:
is a music video of the song of the same name by Hikaru Utada. It was directed by Hibiki Yoshizaki https://www.khara.co.jp/history-en/ and released on the Hikaru Utada official YouTube channel on 19 September 2016. The song was used as the ending theme of the film Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo.

Staff

Director: Hibiki Yoshizaki
Photography: Yamada Toyonori, Hirabayashi Nanae, 浦林和紀
Art: Tatsuya Kushida
Animation Production: Studio Khara inc.
